title: CobbleLegendsMC
description: Official modpack to CobbleLegends. A Cobblemon modpack/server
body:
Small Modpack made by me and my friends for my serve, CobbleLegends

**This project icludes mods like:**
- Cobblemon
- Lumymon
- Cobblemon Alpha project
- Cobblemon Raid dens
- Xaeros map
- Open-pac
- Lootr
- Waystones
- Carryon
- Chiseled
- Charms
- and more


Please feel free to use this pack for your own server if you credit me or for your own singleplayer use
